PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLIG ARBITRATION; PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION; P/A VERIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN SERVED OCT-22-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT DEL RE, MONICA
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION: GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DEL RE, MONICA $22,834.75 PRINCIPAL, $561.30 ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,396.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD: GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER, LAW OFFICES OF DOUGLAS A. KAHN
